tool_args.label: Spring 2014 Newsletter - Webster Avenue SBS

payload.title: +selectbus service Webster Avenue - Newsletter 4 / Spring 2014
payload.publisher: New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT)

NYC Department of Design and Construction

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Select Bus Service

payload.description: Bx41 Select Bus Service launched June 30, 2013 on Webster Avenue in the Bronx. Phase 1 (2013 improvements) complete; Phase 2 (2015-16 capital project) in design.

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Corridor

payload.limits: From The Hub (E 149 St / 3 Av) to E Gun Hill Rd
payload.description: Webster Avenue corridor running from The Hub (E 149 St / 3 Av) in the south to E Gun Hill Rd in the north. Includes bus lanes between E 165th Street and E Gun Hill Road.

tool_args.label: Bx41 Select Bus Service

payload.description: Bx41 Select Bus Service operating on Webster Avenue in the Bronx.

tool_args.label: Bx41 Local

payload.description: Bx41 Local bus service on Webster Avenue.

tool_args.label: Bx41 Limited

payload.description: Bx41 Limited service replaced by Bx41 Select Bus Service.

tool_args.label: Bx12 Select Bus Service

payload.description: Bx12 Select Bus Service shown as an SBS corridor on the Webster Avenue map.

tool_args.label: Off-board fare collection - Webster Avenue SBS

payload.description: SBS customers pay their fare at machines located at SBS stops before boarding, reducing the time to pick up and drop off passengers.

tool_args.label: Bus bulbs planned - Webster Avenue SBS stations

payload.description: 12 bus bulbs are planned for SBS stations along Webster Avenue. Bus bulbs widen the sidewalk to meet the offset bus lane at a bus stop, providing level boarding, bus shelters, benches, greening, and pedestrian wayfinding signs.

tool_args.label: Pedestrian enhancements - Webster Avenue

payload.description: New medians, pedestrian refuge islands, plaza areas, and crosswalks improve the pedestrian environment along Webster Avenue.

tool_args.label: Red painted bus lanes - Webster Avenue

payload.description: Red painted bus lanes on Webster Avenue between E 165th Street and E Gun Hill Road.
payload.location_text: Webster Avenue between E 165th Street and E Gun Hill Road

normalized_location.raw_text: Webster Avenue between E 165th Street and E Gun Hill Road

tool_args.label: Traffic signal optimization - Webster Avenue

payload.description: Traffic signal optimization along the entire route. Transit Signal Priority planned for 2014.

tool_args.label: Offset bus lanes - Webster Avenue

payload.description: Four miles of offset bus lanes along Webster Avenue bring faster and more reliable service to more than 20,000 daily Bx41 riders.

tool_args.label: Bx41 Select Bus Service launch

payload.description: Launch of Bx41 Select Bus Service on Webster Avenue in the Bronx.

tool_args.label: Progress report available Summer 2014

payload.description: A full progress report analyzing the first six months of Bx41 SBS operations will be available.

tool_args.label: Community Board meetings Spring 2014

payload.description: Community Board meetings to present capital project designs for Webster Avenue.

tool_args.label: Phase 2 capital project construction planned 2015-16

payload.description: Construction planned for Phase 2 capital project improvements along Webster Avenue.

tool_args.label: Phase 1 2013 Improvements Complete

payload.claim_text: Phase 1 (COMPLETE) 2013 Improvements: To support the launch of Bx41 Select Bus Service in June 2013, NYCDOT and NYCT implemented priority street design and safety improvements in Spring 2013 along the Webster Avenue corridor.

tool_args.label: Phase 2 capital project in design

payload.claim_text: Phase 2 (IN DESIGN) 2015-16 Capital Project: In partnership with the NYC Department of Design and Construction, a capital project to build more complicated improvements along Webster Avenue is currently in design with construction planned for 2015-16.
